category.taxi.tip: 💡 In Malaysia, Grab is much better than taxis — fixed price, no bargaining!
category.restaurant.tip: 💡 Most restaurants are halal, but Chinese restaurants may not be. Make sure to check!
category.manglish.tip: 💡 Manglish = English + Malay + Chinese mix. When you hear "lah", you're talking to a real Malaysian 😄
